name: Pride
description: Pride flags, color patterns, hearts, and LGBTQ+ history for your split-flap display.
author: FiestaBoard Team

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Render mode: 'art' (flags, patterns, hearts, symbols) or 'history' ('On This Day' LGBTQ+ fact).

selection.title: Selection
selection.description: How to choose the piece in art mode. 'pick' uses the explicit piece setting; the others draw from the pool.

piece.title: Piece
piece.description: Which piece to render when selection is 'pick'.

pool.title: Pool
pool.description: Categories to draw from for rotate/daily/random. Leave empty to use every piece.

rotate_seconds.title: Rotation Interval (seconds)
rotate_seconds.description: When selection is 'rotate', how often to switch pieces (minimum 60).

message.title: Custom Message
message.description: Optional message laid over the active piece (centered). Leave empty for plain art.

refresh_seconds.title: Refresh Interval (seconds)
refresh_seconds.description: How often to recompute the rendered art. Use 30 for the alive Rainbow Sparkle to evolve smoothly.

env_vars.name: PRIDE_PIECE
env_vars.description: Piece id when selection is pick

art.description: Full-board color art for the flagship (6x22) display

art_note.description: Same active piece rendered for the note (3x15) display

piece_id.description: Machine id of the active piece (e.g. rainbow, rainbow_heart)

piece_name.description: Human-readable name of the active piece

piece_category.description: Category of the active piece: flag, pattern, heart, symbol, history

tagline.description: Short tagline associated with the active piece

history_year.description: Year of today's LGBTQ+ history entry, if any

history_text.description: Text of today's LGBTQ+ history entry, if any

screenshots.alt: Rainbow Pride flag on a Vestaboard
screenshots.caption: Rainbow Pride flag — six stripes from red to violet

screenshots.alt: Trans Pride flag on a Vestaboard
screenshots.caption: Trans Pride flag — blue / white / red / white / blue

screenshots.alt: Progress Pride base flag on a Vestaboard
screenshots.caption: Progress Pride base flag (chevron overlays land in v0.3)
Ally flag — black/white stripes with a centered rainbow pyramid
Rainbow Heart — red apex fading to violet point on black

screenshots.alt: Rainbow diagonal pattern on a Vestaboard
screenshots.caption: Rainbow Diagonal — diagonal sweep across the spectrum
Rainbow Sparkle — slowly-evolving sparkle field, one tile per 30s

screenshots.alt: Rainbow Arc pyramid on a Vestaboard
screenshots.caption: Rainbow Arc — centered pyramid bands, red on top
Equality — two yellow bars on a blue field
